payloads.name: uid-increment
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID increment to access another user's payment cards.
payloads.mitigation: Validate that the authenticated user (from token) matches the 'uid' query parameter; implement ownership checks before returning data.

payloads.name: uid-decrement
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID decrement to access another user's payment cards.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce strict ownership validation; log and alert on mismatches between token-subject and requested 'uid'.

payloads.name: uid-admin-id
payloads.reason: Vertical escalation attempt: target low numeric ID often associated with admin or system accounts.
payloads.mitigation: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) and deny access to privileged user IDs unless the requester has admin role.

payloads.name: header-owner-uid-mismatch
payloads.reason: Bypass via matching header to altered query param; tests if server trusts header over token.
payloads.mitigation: Do not use client-supplied headers for authorization decisions; rely solely on validated token claims.

payloads.name: uid-negative
payloads.reason: Boundary test: negative ID may trigger errors or unintended data exposure.
payloads.mitigation: Validate 'uid' parameter format (positive integer, UUID) and reject invalid values with 400 Bad Request.

payloads.name: order-id-increment
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation via sequential ID enumeration.
payloads.mitigation: Implement ownership validation: verify the order belongs to the authenticated user (from token) before returning data.

payloads.name: order-id-decrement
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation via sequential ID enumeration (reverse).
payloads.mitigation: Use unpredictable, non-sequential IDs (e.g., UUIDs) and enforce strict access control checks.

payloads.name: user-id-injection-query
payloads.reason: Attempt to override or specify a different user identifier in query parameters.
payloads.mitigation: Ignore any user/owner parameters from the request; derive identity solely from the validated session/token.

payloads.name: role-escalation-header
payloads.reason: Vertical escalation attempt by injecting admin role via custom header.
payloads.mitigation: Do not trust client-submitted role headers; assign roles server-side based on authenticated session.

payloads.name: tenant-boundary-bypass
payloads.reason: Attempt to access order across tenant/organization boundaries.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce tenant isolation (ABAC) by validating the resource's tenant matches the user's session tenant.

payloads.name: uid-increment
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID increment to access another user's profile.
payloads.mitigation: Implement ownership validation: verify the authenticated user (from token) matches the requested uid; use UUIDs instead of sequential IDs.

payloads.name: uid-decrement
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID decrement to access another user's profile.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce ABAC: check if the user has permission to access the target uid's data; log and alert on mismatched uid requests.

payloads.name: uid-admin
payloads.reason: Vertical escalation: target low numeric ID often assigned to admin users.
payloads.mitigation: Apply RBAC: restrict profile access to self or authorized roles; deny-by-default for privileged accounts.

payloads.name: uid-negative
payloads.reason: Boundary testing: negative ID may trigger errors or unintended access.
payloads.mitigation: Validate input: ensure uid is a positive integer; reject malformed or out-of-range values.

payloads.name: uid-string-injection
payloads.reason: SQL injection attempt via uid parameter to bypass access control.
payloads.mitigation: Use parameterized queries; validate uid as integer; implement WAF rules for SQLi patterns.

payloads.name: uid-increment
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID increment to access another user's settings.
payloads.mitigation: Validate ownership: ensure the authenticated user (from token) matches the requested uid parameter. Implement deny-by-default for mismatched requests.

payloads.name: uid-decrement
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID decrement to access another user's settings.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce strict ownership validation at the API layer. Use UUIDs instead of sequential IDs to reduce predictability.

payloads.name: uid-admin-id
payloads.reason: Vertical escalation attempt: target low numeric ID often reserved for admin or system accounts.
payloads.mitigation: Implement role-based access control (RBAC) and deny access to privileged accounts unless the requester has explicit admin role.

payloads.name: uid-current-user-token-mismatch
payloads.reason: Test token substitution: use a different user's token to access the same uid, checking if token validation is properly enforced.
payloads.mitigation: Validate the JWT or token subject matches the uid parameter. Reject requests where token identity does not correspond to the requested resource owner.

payloads.name: uid-parameter-removal
payloads.reason: Test default behavior: remove uid parameter to see if endpoint defaults to current user or exposes other data.
payloads.mitigation: Require explicit uid parameter for user-specific endpoints. If omitted, return 400 Bad Request, do not default to the authenticated user's data.

payloads.name: admin-role-header
payloads.reason: Replace user token with admin token for vertical escalation
payloads.mitigation: Implement strict RBAC with token validation and deny-by-default for admin endpoints; log and alert on privilege escalation attempts.

payloads.name: tenant-id-header
payloads.reason: Add tenant ID header to attempt cross-tenant access
payloads.mitigation: Enforce tenant isolation via ABAC; validate user's tenant membership from token/session; reject unauthorized tenant IDs.

payloads.name: user-id-query
payloads.reason: Add user_id query param to filter as admin user
payloads.mitigation: Validate ownership: user_id must match authenticated user or be authorized via RBAC; audit all query parameter usage.

payloads.name: role-query
payloads.reason: Add role query param to attempt higher privilege filter
payloads.mitigation: Server-side role validation: ignore client-supplied role parameters; derive role from authenticated session only.

payloads.name: org-id-header
payloads.reason: Add organization ID header to test boundary crossover
payloads.mitigation: Implement organization-level access control; map user to org via backend; reject unassociated org IDs.

payloads.name: increment-id
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation via numeric ID increment to access other announcements.
payloads.mitigation: Implement ownership validation: ensure the authenticated user has explicit read permission for the requested announcement ID via server-side checks.

payloads.name: negative-id
payloads.reason: Test for IDOR via negative or out-of-range ID values.
payloads.mitigation: Validate ID input: enforce positive integer range, reject malformed or out-of-scope IDs, and log failed authorization attempts.

payloads.name: admin-id-bypass
payloads.reason: Attempt to access system-level announcement (ID 0) reserved for admin.
payloads.mitigation: Apply ABAC: check user role and announcement visibility scope; restrict admin-only announcements with deny-by-default policy.

payloads.name: uuid-injection
payloads.reason: Replace numeric ID with UUID format to test parser weaknesses or access different object types.
payloads.mitigation: Use strongly typed IDs (e.g., UUID v4) and validate format/type before processing; map IDs to user context securely.

payloads.name: tenant-crossover
payloads.reason: Attempt to access announcement from different tenant by jumping to high ID range.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce tenant isolation: include tenant_id in query constraints and validate it matches the user's session tenant.

payloads.name: uid-increment
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID increment to access another user's avatar.
payloads.mitigation: Validate ownership: ensure uid matches authenticated user's ID from token; implement deny-by-default for cross-user data access.

payloads.name: uid-decrement
payloads.reason: Horizontal escalation: numeric ID decrement to access another user's avatar.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce ABAC: check if requested uid belongs to the same tenant/org as the authenticated user; log and alert on mismatches.

payloads.name: uid-admin-id
payloads.reason: Vertical escalation: attempt to access admin user's avatar via low numeric ID.
payloads.mitigation: Implement RBAC: restrict access to admin resources; use UUIDs instead of sequential IDs to reduce predictability.

payloads.name: uid-parameter-removal
payloads.reason: Boundary bypass: remove uid parameter to see default/self behavior.
payloads.mitigation: Require explicit ownership parameter; reject requests missing uid with 400 Bad Request; default to authenticated user's ID only after validation.

payloads.name: uid-negative
payloads.reason: Boundary testing: negative ID to probe error handling or access unintended data.
payloads.mitigation: Validate input: ensure uid is positive integer or valid UUID; reject malformed values; implement strict type checking.

payloads.name: numeric-id-increment
payloads.reason: Increment numeric part of file_id to access another user's file.
payloads.mitigation: Validate ownership via session token; use random UUIDs instead of sequential IDs; log and alert on access attempts to non-owned resources.

payloads.name: user-id-swap-in-query
payloads.reason: Replace file_id with another user's file identifier to test horizontal privilege escalation.
payloads.mitigation: Implement strict access control checks (ABAC) verifying the authenticated user's ownership of the requested file_id; enforce deny-by-default policy.

payloads.name: admin-file-access
payloads.reason: Attempt to access admin-level file by using a privileged file_id pattern.
payloads.mitigation: Role-based access control (RBAC) for file categories; separate admin file storage with distinct authorization middleware; audit all admin file accesses.

payloads.name: tenant-boundary-cross
payloads.reason: Modify file_id to include another tenant identifier to test multi-tenant isolation bypass.
payloads.mitigation: Enforce tenant isolation via middleware extracting tenant from token and validating it matches the resource's tenant; use tenant-scoped queries.

payloads.name: role-escalation-via-header
payloads.reason: Replace user token with admin token to attempt vertical privilege escalation.
payloads.mitigation: Validate token integrity and role claims server-side; implement least privilege; log and alert on role elevation attempts from non-admin IPs or unusual patterns.
